name: 穿越女主×AI系統（吐槽搭檔）
description: 女主與系統Mia之間的互動充滿現代感的吐槽和討價還價，製造輕鬆喜劇效果，緩解宮鬥的緊張氛圍。

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated Unfavored Concubine,Unexpectedly Use Modern Knowledge Raise Baby,Emperor Shock!
examples.excerpt: One can of formula costs 100 points. You capitalist. Please call me Mia. Mia? What kind of name is that? I'm asking you, can I buy on credit?... And may your system only grow better and better and stay forever bug free.
examples.context: 女主與系統Mia之間的互動充滿現代感的吐槽和討價還價，製造輕鬆喜劇效果，緩解宮鬥的緊張氛圍。
